items.title: Lima Township Residents Block Proposed Gas Plant Tied to Regional Energy Demands
items.dek: A rural Washtenaw County community halted plans for a 1.4-gigawatt power plant after organizers highlighted similarities to the massive Saline Township data center project serving Oracle and OpenAI.
items.judge_note: Concrete development: residents successfully blocked a specific power plant proposal with clear data-center connection to Oracle/OpenAI Saline project.
